name: Season3Warp
description: Enables the warp crystal in the shopping district to warp to Hidden Village Piremoth and Mergoda Golden Palace

name: BitterblackMazeEntrance
description: Controls if the portal to Bitterblack Maze is usable or not.

name: BloodbaneIslePrecipice
description: Controls if the portal in cave harbor can warp to Bloodbane Isle Precipice or not.

name: GardnoxFortress
description: Allows the player to enter Gardnox Fortress when set

name: DreedCastle
description: Allows the player to enter Dreed Castle when set

name: MergodaSecurityDistrict
description: Allows the player to enter Mergoda Security District when set

name: KnightsDepotRuins
description: Allows the player to enter the Knights' Depot Ruins when set

name: TempleOfPurificationSouthChamber
description: Allows the player to enter "Temple of Purification: South Chamber" when set

name: BloodbaneIsleSummit
description: Unlocks the door to Bloodbane Isle Summit and opens the gate at (51,-28)

name: PathToMorrow
description: Unlocks the Path to Morrow when set.

name: DanaGate
description: Opens the gates around Dana when set.

name: KingalCanyonBorderCheckpoint
description: Unlocks the "Kingal Canyon Border Checkpoint" when set (from Dana to Glyndwr)

name: VegasaCorridorSouth
description: Unlocks the southern "Vegasa Corridor" entrance when set

name: MorfaulWestGate
description: Opens the Western Gate in Morfaul when set

name: VegasaCorridorWest
description: Unlocks the western "Vegasa Corridor" entrance when set Morrow Forest

name: GlyndwrGates
description: Opens the gates around Glyndwr when set

name: ShadoleanGreatTemple
description: Unlocks "Shadolean Great Temple" when set (st0439).

name: VegasaCorridorEast
description: Unlocks the eastern "Vegasa Corridor" entrance when set Kingal Canyon

name: QuestBoard
description: Unlocks the quest board in Manun Village when set.

name: QuestBoard
description: Unlocks the quest board in the Tower of Ivanos when set.

name: HollowOfBeginningsGatheringArea
description: Unlocks "Hollow Of Beginnings GatheringArea" in Stage.HollowofBeginnings0 when set.

name: ValtableHall
description: Unlocks "Valtable Hall" in Stage.HollowofBeginnings0 when set

name: ValtableHallUpperArea
description: Unlocks "Valtable Hall Upper Area" when set.

name: OrcEncampmentInnerGate
description: Opens the gate in the back of the fortress used in the 2nd MSW in 3.0

name: OrcEncampmentGate
description: Toggles the gate for Orc Encampment after being populated with shops.

name: FortThinesGate
description: Opens the gate in fortress in front of Fort Thines.

name: CaveOfHellsDescent
description: Opens the entrance to the cave of hells descent.

name: EpitaphRoadRathniteFoothills
description: Opens the door to Epitaph Road: Rathnite Foothills

name: RothgillFrontGate
description: Opens the front gate to Rothgill.

name: GateToBandGroupHide
description: Opens the front gate to Bertha's Bandit Group Hideout

name: DarkPathToTheSecretSpring
description: Opens the door to "Dark Path to the Secret Spring" dungeon

name: WestFeryanaGate
description: Opens gate next to "West Feryana Wilderness" warp point

name: ActivateLookoutCastleWarp
description: Activates the door to Lookout castle

name: EpitaphRoadFeryanaWilderness
description: Opens the gate to Epitaph Road: Feryana Wilderness

name: GrandMission
description: Adds "Grand Mission" title and functionality to Travers, Logan, Hancock and Cornelia. Found in npc.nll.json

name: DragonForceAugmentation
description: Adds "Dragon Force Augmentation" functionality to The White Dragon. Found in npc.nll.json

name: SpecialSkillAugmentation
description: Opens up the menu to start the S3 BO/HO tree at the White Dragon.

name: PartyCreation
description: Adds "Party Creation" to various NCPCs.
